reason: Verified 1:1 AC mapping from TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md to YAML: 38 FR ACs (9+8+8+6+7) + 31 NFR ACs (1+3+3+4+2+2+5+3+3+5) = 69 tc_ids enumerated in tests block, matching SRS.md AC inventory and matrix rows exactly. by_fr/by_nfr/by_layer arithmetic reconciles (40 unit + 19 integration + 2 bench + 8 static = 69). Every function_name follows the test_<req><n>_<seq>_<descriptor> convention declared in line 10 (test_fr01_01..09, test_fr02_01..08, ..., test_nfr10_01..05). No range syntax in matrix §2.1/§3.1, so no risk of TC-collapsing drift; no silent omission (every matrix AC has a matching TC). No contradictory upstream decisions found. Two low-severity gaps carry forward from B-2 review of TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md (NFR-05-02 [NFR-XX] extension, NFR-09-03 missing [DERIVED: SRS.md:303] annotation);
